segments.caption: The tracked note has been clobbered - no improver marker left
segments.expectedScreen: terminal showing knowledge-memory.md content with no improver marker comment

segments.caption: Run the real nightly CLI: ecosystem-update + reapply-sweep run on every invocation
segments.expectedScreen: terminal running node improver.mjs run-now to completion

segments.caption: Ecosystem-update logged its run (safely skipped - no apm.yml here)
segments.expectedScreen: terminal showing ecosystem-update-log.json with a skipped entry mentioning apm.yml

segments.caption: Reapply sweep found the clobbered entry and restored it
segments.expectedScreen: terminal showing reapply-sweep-log.json with checked 1 restored 1 failed empty

segments.caption: The tracked note is back - marker restored on top of the clobbered content
segments.expectedScreen: terminal showing knowledge-memory.md now containing the improver marker comment and the restored note text

segments.text: Nightly cron: safe ecosystem update + automatic drift repair
segments.subtitle: docs/autothing/runs/20260701-092738-9b939e7a
